caption: Three people are seated on gold-framed chairs during a panel discussion on a dark stage. On the left, a man with dark hair and a beard wears a white button-down shirt and dark pants. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a black t-shirt and black pants. To the right, a man wears a light blue dress shirt under a grey suit. He is actively speaking and gesturing with his hands throughout the sequence. Small white decorative blocks sit on the floor in front of the chairs. Pink neon light tubes stand vertically behind the panelists. In the background, partial white lettering is visible, including the letters "L" and "S". As the sequence progresses, the man in the grey suit shifts his posture and hand positions while speaking, while the other two panelists remain relatively still, listening and looking toward him.
